section.name: Overview
section.text:
S-Curve Path Planning Plugin
This plugin provides complete path planning, velocity planning, and collision avoidance for autonomous vehicles navigating S-curve scenarios.

section.name: Features
section.text: - S-curve parametric path generation - Curvature-based velocity planning - Vehicle dynamics constraint handling - Obstacle detection and avoidance - Collision checking and validation - Real-time trajectory optimization

section.name: Dependencies
section.text: - Eigen3 (matrix operations) - Apollo Common (data structures) - Apollo Planning (planning interface)

section.name: Configuration
section.text:
Configuration file: config/s_curve_config.yaml
Key parameters: - road_width: Path width (m) - first_curve_diameter: Front S-curve diameter (m) - second_curve_diameter: Rear S-curve diameter (m) - vehicle_width: Vehicle width (m) - max_velocity: Maximum speed (m/s) - safety_margin: Safety distance to obstacles (m)

section.name: Usage
section.text: 1. Initialize the planner with scenario configuration 2. Set vehicle initial state 3. Call plan() with obstacle list 4. Retrieve generated trajectory 5. Validate trajectory safety before execution
